task: Build the autoresearch skill: a nightly research pipeline that rotates through topic tracks (AI/agents, crypto/DeFi, developer tools), pulls from arXiv, GitHub trending, Hacker News, and web search, synthesises into a structured markdown report saved to memory/autoresearch-latest.md. The skill lives in ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/autoresearch/ and includes: SKILL.md, scripts/run.py (main pipeline), scripts/sources.py (fetchers), scripts/synthesise.py (report builder). After building, wire a nightly cron at 1 AM Sydney that runs the pipeline and saves output. The book draft cron (id: 9c4835bf) should be updated to read autoresearch-latest.md as source material before writing. No new repo needed — workspace skill only.
